name: Abstract
title: Abstract
description: Multi-page masonry blog template with a sticky header containing logo, dropdown navigation (Home, Categories with 8 sub-items, Blog with 4 post types, Styles, About, Contact), hamburger menu toggle, and search overlay with input field. Featured post slider at top spans full width with 3 slides (background images, date/author meta, large title links, prev/next arrow navigation). Below the slider, a masonry grid displays 12+ blog post cards in mixed formats: standard posts with thumbnail images (srcset for retina), category tags, titles, and excerpts; quote post with blockquote styling; gallery post with image slider; link post; audio post; and video post with Vimeo lightbox. Pagination with numbered pages and prev/next arrows. Footer has 4 columns: About info, Site Links list, Social links list, and email Subscribe form. Back-to-top button. Preloader animation on load.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif pairing. Roboto for body text, Inter for headings. Strong contrast between body and heading weights.

layoutDetails: Masonry grid layout with CSS columns. Featured slider spans full width. Footer uses 4-column grid (large-4, large-2, large-2, large-4). Responsive with breakpoints at 600px, 800px, 1000px, 1200px. BEM-style class naming.
visualStyle: Clean editorial blog with light gray background. Masonry layout creates visual interest with varied card heights. Featured slider provides bold visual entry point. Mixed post formats add variety. Subtle animations on scroll.

name: Maillard
title: Maillard
description: Sophisticated dark-themed restaurant template with an upscale dining aesthetic. Opens with a booking request overlay/modal and a fullscreen hero featuring the restaurant name 'Maillard' in large serif typography with navigation links and a 'Book a Table' CTA. The about section tells the restaurant's story with rich descriptive text and a 'Discover More' link. A signature dishes section showcases 5 dishes (Grilled Sirloin Steak, Marinara Fettucine, Egg Salad Avocado Toast, Vanilla Ice Cream, Yogurt With Strawberries) with images, names, descriptions, and prices in a visually rich layout with an 'Explore All Menu' button. The testimonials section displays client quotes with a Swiper slider. A photo gallery section uses GLightbox for fullscreen image viewing. The footer contains three info blocks: Location with address, Contacts with email and phone, and Opening Hours with weekday/weekend schedules. Social links and newsletter signup. Multi-page structure with separate menu, about, and reservations pages. Uses CSS custom properties with warm earth-tone palette and multiple serif fonts (Newsreader, Cormorant Garamond, Cormorant SC).

typography.fontFamily: Newsreader, serif (body); Cormorant Garamond, serif (display); Cormorant SC, serif (small caps); Inter, sans-serif (UI)
typography.style: Rich multi-serif typography system with Newsreader body, Cormorant Garamond display, and Cormorant SC for elegant small-caps labels. Four-font system creating a luxurious, editorial dining aesthetic.

layoutDetails: Multi-page site with separate pages for menu, about, and reservations. Fullscreen hero with overlay navigation. Centered content sections with generous spacing. Swiper for testimonials, GLightbox for gallery.
visualStyle: Dark, luxurious, warm-toned restaurant aesthetic with rich serif typography and warm earth-tone palette. Red-orange accent on black with warm beige text creates an intimate, upscale dining atmosphere.

name: Designer
title: Designer - Creative HTML5 Template
description: Multi-page interior design agency template (Bootstrap 5). SVG animated preloader on dark bg. Transparent navbar with logo and 5 links. Hero banner with fullscreen bg image, coral-red (#ff565b) emphasized heading, white CTA. Search form with 4 filter fields. Explore Work section with large left image and 4 work items with SVG icons. Trending section with text and image card. Contact with form and Google Maps. Footer with 3 columns.

typography.style: Modern Poppins, bold headings, coral-red em emphasis with decorative line

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 5 grid with expanded container (max-width 100%, padding 0 7%). Navbar absolute. Sections 60px padding-top/margin-top.
visualStyle: Modern, elegant interior design aesthetic. Coral-red accent. Clean typography with decorative heading lines. Large imagery with hover overlays.

name: Holiday
title: Holiday - templatemo
description: Travel/tourism multi-page template with a black header and yellow accent color. Navigation with site name and 4 links with yellow active/hover state. FlexSlider banner with 3 travel destination slides. Below the banner, a 3-column layout: left column has a tabbed Hotel/Car Rental search form with date pickers and yellow gradient submit buttons; center and right columns show destination cards (New York $6,600, Paris $4,200) with colored gradient price bars. Section with 4 travel blog cards with images, titles, dates, and action icons. Bottom section has a 3-column layout with large featured image, text content, and a sidebar with thumbnail list.

typography.style: Clean Open Sans with bold headings, large banner titles (74px), uppercase navigation

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container. Multi-page structure. FlexSlider for banner. Bootstrap datetimepicker for date inputs. Tabbed search form.
visualStyle: Bright travel template with black header, yellow accents, colorful destination cards with gradient price bars, and clean search functionality.

name: Journey
title: Journey HTML CSS Template
description: Travel booking single-page template with top navigation bar featuring logo and 4 links (Home, Top Destinations, Recommended Places, Contact Us). Fullscreen hero banner with background image, centered heading 'Let’s begin', dot decoration, subtitle, and down-arrow link. Below hero is a comprehensive search form with destination input, room count dropdown, adult/children selectors, check-in/check-out date pickers, and Check Availability button. About section with gray background, centered heading and description with Continue Explore button. Top Destinations section features 3 alternating slideshow-and-description blocks (Europe, Asia, America) using Slick slider, each with image carousel on one side and colored description panel on the other. Recommended Places section has 6 continent tab navigation (North America, South America, Europe, Asia, Africa, Australia) with continent icons, showing a 4-column card grid per tab with destination images, titles, descriptions, and Read More links. Contact section with 2-column layout: left has contact info and right has a contact form. Footer with copyright.

typography.style: Light and airy sans-serif with thin body weights for a travel-friendly feel

layoutDetails: Full-width hero banner with overlay. Container-based content sections. Alternating slideshow sections use 50/50 split with float-based layout. Tab content uses 4-column Bootstrap grid. Responsive collapses at 992px and 768px.
visualStyle: Bright and inviting travel aesthetic with teal and amber accents. Full-width image slideshows alternate with colored description panels. Clean card-based destination grid with continent-based tab navigation.

name: Ocean Vibes
title: OCEAN vibes by TemplateMo
description: Travel/ocean-themed single-page template with bright blue (#309AFD) accent color. Hero section with background video player and heading 'OCEAN vibes' with play/pause control. Introduction section with welcome text. Gallery section with 36 images in grid layout using Magnific Popup lightbox for inline popup viewing. Testimonials section with client quotes. About section with company/brand description. Contact section with form (including select dropdown) and embedded Google Map. Source Sans Pro font for clean readability. Video background hero creates immersive ocean atmosphere. Extensive responsive breakpoints (13) from 532px to 1264px.

typography.style: Clean Source Sans Pro, professional travel/lifestyle feel

layoutDetails: Custom CSS layout (no Bootstrap). Video background hero with play/pause control. Gallery grid with 36 images and Magnific Popup lightbox. Testimonial cards. Contact form with select dropdown and Google Map. 13 responsive breakpoints.
visualStyle: Ocean-inspired travel aesthetic with bright blue accents and video hero background. Image-rich gallery (36 photos) creates immersive visual experience. Clean, inviting design.

name: Travel
title: Travel Responsive Web Template
description: Multi-page travel and tourism template with a FlexSlider hero carousel showing destination images with price tags, city names, descriptions, and booking buttons overlaid. Below the slider, an Owl Carousel displays destination cards with thumbnail images, country titles, hotel details (name, nights, stars), and price/booking buttons. A middle content area with a background image. Partner logos section shows 6 partner brand images in a row. Footer with social icons, newsletter signup, and contact info. Separate pages for Services, Events, About Us, and Contact.

typography.style: Open Sans with bold headings and light body text, clean travel aesthetic

layoutDetails: Multi-page with full-width hero slider. Destination cards in Owl Carousel. Partner logos in 6-column row. Footer with 3-column layout. Separate inner pages.
visualStyle: Clean travel/tourism style. Teal/green accent with red price tags. Large destination images. Card-based listings with hotel details. Professional booking-oriented layout.

name: Adventure
title: Adventure Bootstrap Template
description: Travel and adventure template with a full-screen BX Slider hero featuring large background images of travel destinations, overlay captions with headlines and CTA buttons, and thumbnail navigation. A parallax section with a dark overlay presents the adventure theme. A work/destinations section shows an Owl Carousel of destination cards with images and descriptions. An about section displays animated counter facts (projects, clients, etc.) with border separators. A team section shows member cards with photos, names, roles, and social links. A portfolio section presents a grid of travel images with hover overlays and lightbox popups. A contact section includes a form and contact details. Orange accent (#ffa400) evokes warmth and adventure.
layoutDetails: Full-width stacked sections. Full-screen hero slider with thumbnail navigation. Parallax sections with dark overlays. Destination carousel. Counter facts row. Team cards grid. Portfolio image grid with lightbox.
visualStyle: Adventure travel with warm orange accent, full-screen hero imagery, parallax scrolling effects, and image-heavy layouts. Dark overlays on hero sections create dramatic contrast. Clean card-based content sections.

typography.style: Clean geometric sans-serif (Raleway) with wide letter-spacing on headings. Uppercase styling throughout. Large display sizes for hero text.

name: Flight
title: Flight - Travel and Tour
description: Feature-rich travel and tour booking template built on Bootstrap 3. Opens with a full-width hero carousel slider with overlay text and a prominent booking form with destination, date picker, and budget fields organized in tabs. Below, a weather forecast section displays 5-day weather data in a tabbed interface. A services section presents three icon-based service cards. A recommended hotels section includes an embedded YouTube video player and hotel listing cards. The most-visited places section shows destination cards with images, descriptions, and Discover buttons in a grid layout. Footer contains contact info, quick links, and social media icons.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif throughout. Bold headings with regular body text. Warm yellow accent on interactive elements.

layoutDetails: Full-width hero carousel with overlay booking form. Tabbed content sections for weather and hotels. Three-column service cards grid. Multi-column destination cards. Fixed-top navigation.
visualStyle: Bright travel theme with warm yellow accent. White background with dark navy navigation. Card-based content layout. Image-heavy destination showcases with overlay text.

name: Scenic
title: Scenic HTML Template
description: Creative agency single-page with fullscreen video background hero, dark overlay, CTA with 3D flip animation. Fixed nav. About with large text. 2x2 project grid with Magnific Popup lightbox. Team Owl Carousel with social links. Contact form with Google Maps. Preloader.
layoutDetails: Single-page with fixed nav. Video hero. 2x2 project grid. Carousel team.
visualStyle: Clean modern with video hero, green accent. Light typography.
